title: Should You Dump Bitcoin for Stocks After the S&P 500 Hit a New Record on Apple’s $100 Billion Buyback?
description: When it comes to where you put your money, the choice between crypto and stocks has always been one of the hardest to make in investing. One side gives you steady compounding backed by company earnings, while the other gives you a fixed-supply asset that comes up as high risk/high reward. Most people usually hold ... Should You Dump Bitcoin for Stocks After the S&P 500 Hit a New Record on Apple’s $100 Billion Buyback?
